summary: Backend and mobile-web Voice AI regression tested. /api/chat reminder task creation, /api/voice/transcribe audio field, /api/voice/process file alias, and Voice suggestion-driven AI response/result card all passed.

integration_issues.issue: Supervisor logs still show intermittent ngrok/tunnel startup failures. Public preview was reachable during this run, but instability remains environmental risk.

action_items: Monitor/fix Expo tunnel/ngrok instability seen in supervisor logs to reduce flaky preview availability.
Optional: add a stable UI test path for microphone recording once environment supports deterministic media input in preview automation.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is still very large (>700 lines); split into modules (routes/services/models) to reduce regression risk and improve maintainability.
seed_data_creation: AI reminder tests created temporary task records and cleaned up test-created task IDs in new regression test fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Initial false negatives on voice multipart tests were caused by test session header Content-Type=application/json; fixed by using direct requests.post(files=...) for multipart. App endpoints then passed.
rca_of_issue: No functional app regression found in requested AI scope. Only recurring environment concern is intermittent Expo tunnel instability (ngrok/body undefined errors in supervisor expo.err), which can temporarily block UI access.
test_credentials: File /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but is empty. No auth flow was part of this testing scope.
